description: You wake up in a freezing prison cell deep beneath Ravenspire Castle, {player_name}.
A guard appears outside the bars when you call for help.
The cell door has an old lock and weak rusted hinges.
You step into the prison corridor. One path is lit by torchlight and the other disappears into darkness.
You find a cracked stone stairway and a cellar door below.
The passage divides again near the inner halls of the castle.
You reach two major paths inside the castle.
You arrive at the inner castle where two hallways lead onward.
The side hall is completely dark and narrow.
Inside the royal archive you search through old records and sealed drawers.
You discover a hidden note about a rope path near the upper wall.
The corridor divides once more near the upper wing of the castle.
You move toward the final wing leading to the main gate.
You reach the mechanism that controls the main gate of Ravenspire.
A hidden trap chamber closes around you after the wrong answer.
The gate is open and the outside world is finally in sight.
You find treasure while the castle begins to shake and collapse.
The castle is collapsing around you and the floor is breaking apart.
You escape with the Royal Seal and expose the truth behind Ravenspire Castle, {player_name}. This is the true ending.
You escape alive, {player_name}, but without the full truth of the castle. This is the normal ending.
You delay too long or choose greed over survival. Ravenspire Castle collapses with you still inside. Game over, {player_name}.
